things.name: Imam Reza Shrine Complex
things.description: Islam's largest shrine complex - the holiest site in Iran, drawing 25 million pilgrims annually

things.name: Astan Quds Razavi Museum
things.description: Extraordinary collection of Islamic art, Qurans, carpets and gifts to the shrine

things.name: Goharshad Mosque
things.description: 15th-century Timurid mosque of supreme beauty within the shrine complex

things.name: Ferdowsi Tomb
things.description: Mausoleum of Abolqasem Ferdowsi, author of the Shahnameh - Iran's greatest poet

things.name: Kooh Sangi Park
things.description: Mountain park with rock formations, lakes and the famous stone garden

things.name: Nader Shah Mausoleum
things.description: Tomb of the powerful 18th-century Persian king in a striking modern building

things.name: Old Bazaar of Mashhad
things.description: Traditional covered market near the shrine with saffron, dried fruits and pilgrim goods

things.name: Mellat Park
things.description: Mashhad's largest urban park with a boating lake, cable car and green spaces

things.name: Haram-e Razavi Illuminations
things.description: The shrine complex spectacularly illuminated at night - best seen from Shohada Square

things.name: Samen District Historic Hammams
things.description: Traditional Persian bathhouses in the old city near the shrine
